system.notes: Radically re-tunes the engine to exceed the power plant's standard maxima. Each level adds +30 Speed OR +5 Acceleration OR +(Body × 50) kg Load (each rating bought separately); max = the power-plant maximum × 1.75. Design cost = power-plant Design-Point cost × 1.25 for the first level, +0.5 to the multiplier per added level; parts cost = original power-plant cost × the same multiplier; Avail 8/14 days; Street Index 2; Base Time 40 hrs/level. (Can stress the engine — see book.) Rigger 2 p.120.
